sections.paragraph:
ἄρνησις, εως, ἡ (s. ἀρνέομαι; Aeschyl.+; PCairZen 228, 8; Job 16:8 Aq.; Jos., Ant. 16, 216, C. Ap. 2, 276) repudiation, rejection (opp. ὁμολόγησις) Hs 9, 28, 7; 8, 8, 4 (s. ἀρνέομαι 3g). εἰς ἄ. τινα τρέπειν bring someone to a denial (of the person’s faith) MPol 2:4.—EDNT. TW.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

PCairZen PCairZen = Zenon Papyri, Catalogue général . . . du Musée du Caire—List 4

Aq Aq , II a.d.—List 5

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

opp. opp. = opposed to, opposite

Hs Hs = Similitudes

MPol MPol = Martyrdom of Polycarp; after II a.d.—List 1

EDNT EDNT = Exegetical Dictionary of the NT—List 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 133
